pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Triton+CUTLASS fused MLP with precomputed act gradients, sp4608 vocab all-int6 GPTQ, and GPU-side sparse causal n-gram tilt via fast C++ hash.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA+CUTLASS EVT MLP with precomputed activation gradients
All-int6 GPTQ over sp4608 vocab within 16MB
GPU-side sparse causal n-gram tilt using fast open-addressing hash
